The '''Kasa Horansi''' were a subspecies of the [[Horansi]] species native to [[Mutanda]].

==Biology and appearance==
Kasa stood on average between 2 and 2.7 [[Meter/Legends|meters]]. Although there was variation as to the reddish-orange to light tan coloring of their fur, their black stripes truly marked their race. They had thick tufts of [[Hair/Legends|hair]] behind their triangular [[Ear/Legends|ears]]. They were the most intelligent of the Horansi subspecies and were considered to be brave and trustworthy.<ref name="PC" />

==Society and culture==
Because of their curiosity, the Kasa acquired off-world knowledge, and some had even left the planet to explore the wider [[Galaxy/Legends|Galaxy]]. They had developed low level technology but obtained [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]], medicines, and [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift vehicles]] by trading with representatives on [[Justa]].

Their tribes were generally peaceful, but they did occasionally have skirmishes with the [[Gorvan Horansi]]. All tribal leaders were [[Albino/Legends|albinos]] which was thought to be an old custom. They were the second most powerful group on Mutanda.<ref name="PC" />
